title: chrysosplenium jienningense
intro: Chrysosplenium jienningense, also known as Jinning Spurge, is a rare and endangered plant species in the genus Chrysosplenium, which is a group of flowering plants belonging to the family Saxifragaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium jienningense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity and conservation status.
